text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
There is but one answer to your<n>woes, and that
is to become more<n>marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: More marvelous? Uh... What do you<n>mean by—

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
By marveling at marvels, of course!<n>The fact that
we were born... The fact<n>that we crossed paths...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Why, they're all fabulous miracles!<n>Destiny!
Statistically marvelous<n>marvels!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
You've been marvelous since you<n>were born! ☆
And the fact that you're<n>here in this moment is
equally<n>marvelous! ★

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I see! Destiny and miracles... They're<n>both
marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, I think I feel a bit better now!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Nice! Oh, you there, do you have<n>something
weighing on your mind too?<n>Well, come on over!
I'm all ears! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous Sunday looks at me with<n>shining,
expectant eyes... Well, I might<n>as well ask for her
advice while I'm<n>here.
choice_data_list: I want to be more motivated.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: I see! That's okay! The fact thatyou've noticed how tired you are isreally great! It's marvelous even!☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
If you continue to believe in yourself,<n>then you'll
be filled with marvelous<n>power one day!
Ahahaha! ☆ Ahahaha!<n>★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: I see! That's okay! The fact that youwant to want to be more motivated isreally great! It's marvelous even!☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
If you keep doing what you're doing,<n>I'm sure
you'll naturally find the<n>motivation one day!
Ahahaha! ☆<n>Ahahaha! ★
